variable name - description: id_event - Subject ID concatenated data collection event (V1, V2, V3, etc.)
id - Subject ID

event - Study-specific visit/event short name (V1, In-person visit 1 | V2, In-person visit 2 | V3, In-person visit 3 | V4, In-person visit 4 | F1, First followup survey one year after first in-person visit in HCA | F2, Second followup survey in HCA | F3, Third followup survey in HCA | CR, Surveys collected remotely during Covid lock-down without regard to visit timing | AF1, First followup survey one year after first in-person visit in AABC)
study - Study during which data for this timepoint were collected

asa24_g_total - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Total whole and refined grains (oz. eq.)

asa24_g_refined - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Refined grains that do not contain all of the components of the entire grain kernel (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_total - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Total meat, poultry, organ meat, cured meat, seafood, eggs, soy, and nuts and seeds; excludes legumes (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_mps_total - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Total of meat, poultry, seafood, organ meat, and cured meat (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_meat - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Beef, veal, pork, lamb, and game meat; excludes organ meat and cured meat (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_curedmeat - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Frankfurters, sausages, corned beef, and luncheon meat that are made from beef, pork, or poultry (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_organ - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Organ meat from beef, veal, pork, lamb, game, and poultry (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_poult - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Chicken, turkey, Cornish hens, duck, goose, quail, and pheasant (game birds); excludes organ meat and cured meat (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_seafd_hi - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Seafood (finfish, shellfish, and other seafood) high in n-3 fatty acids (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_seafd_low - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Seafood (finfish, shellfish, and other seafood) low in n-3 fatty acids (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_eggs - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Eggs (chicken, duck, goose, quail) and egg substitutes (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_soy - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Soy products, excluding calcium fortified soy milk and immature soybeans (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_nutsds - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Peanuts, tree nuts, and seeds; excludes coconut (oz. eq.)
asa24_pf_legumes - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Beans and Peas (legumes) computed as protein foods (oz. eq.)

asa24_d_total - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Total milk, yogurt, cheese, whey. For some foods, the total dairy values could be higher than sum of D_MILK, D_YOGURT, and D_CHEESE because Misc dairy component composed of whey which is not included in FPED as separate variable. (cup eq.)
asa24_d_milk - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Fluid milk, buttermilk, evaporated milk, dry milk, and calcium fortified soy milk (cup eq.)
asa24_d_yogurt - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Yogurt (cup eq.)
asa24_d_cheese - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Cheeses (cup eq.)

asa24_oils - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Fats naturally present in nuts, seeds, seafood; unhydrogenated vegetable oils, except palm oil, palm kernel oil,  coconut oils; fat in avocado and olives above allowable amount; 50% of fat present in stick/tub margarines, margarine spreads (grams)

asa24_solid_fats - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Fats naturally present in meat, poultry, eggs, dairy (lard, tallow, butter); hydrogenated/partially hydrogenated oils; shortening, palm, palm kernel, coconut oils; coconut meat, cocoa butter; 50% of fat in stick/tub margarines, margarine spreads (grams)
asa24_add_sugars - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Foods defined as added sugars (tsp. eq.)
asa24_a_drinks - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: Alcoholic beverages and alcohol (ethanol) added to foods after cooking (no. of drinks)

asa24_datacomp - Asa24 Food Diary Totals: This is an indicator which shows if the portion and/or nutrient data was complete or missing for any food/beverage in the recall (refer to INFMYPHEI file to locate the individual foods/beverages with missing data).
